_comment: All spoken/written text lives here so you can rewrite the whole game's voice without touching code. Two shapes: 'lines' = simple text banks (random or sequential), 'trees' = branching NPC conversations used later when you talk to people in town.

phone_boot: NEW PHONE WHO DIS. (it's the same cracked phone, you just turned it on)
3 missed calls. all from the pawn shop. cool cool cool.
landlord_text: rent's due in 12 days. the radiator is 'a feature' now. - mgmt
pawnshop_text: your gear's safe with me. for now. $350 buys it back. tick tock. - Sal

trees._comment: Example branching conversation. Used in a later step when you walk up to an NPC. Each node has text + choices; a choice can goto another node, run effects, or end.

n0.text: You the one putting up flyers? I hit things for a living. Drums, mostly.

n1.text: Maybe. I don't play hungry, though. Bring snacks to practice and we'll talk.
